 {"id":"brenner_bot-7oto","title":"Task: Create Hypothesis CLI Commands","description":"# Task: Create Hypothesis CLI Commands

## Objective
Implement CLI commands for managing hypotheses: list, show, create, link, search.

## Implementation Details

### File Location
Add to `brenner.ts` CLI or create `apps/web/scripts/hypothesis-cli.ts`

### Commands

#### `brenner hypothesis list`
```bash
brenner hypothesis list [--state=<state>] [--session=<id>] [--format=table|json]

# Examples:
brenner hypothesis list
brenner hypothesis list --state=active
brenner hypothesis list --session=RS-20251230
```

Output:
```
ID                  | State  | Statement (truncated)
--------------------|--------|----------------------------------
H-RS20251230-001    | active | Cell fate is epigenetically...
H-RS20251230-002    | killed | Methylation is the only...
H-RS20251231-001    | active | Third alternative: chromatin...
```

#### `brenner hypothesis show <id>`
```bash
brenner hypothesis show H-RS20251230-001

# Output:
Hypothesis: H-RS20251230-001
Statement: Cell fate is epigenetically determined by methylation patterns
  established during early development.

State: active
Origin: proposed
Session: RS-20251230
Proposed by: BlueLake (codex-cli)
Created: 2025-12-30T10:00:00Z
Updated: 2025-12-30T10:00:00Z

Tags: epigenetics, cell-fate, methylation
Notes: Initial hypothesis from paradox discussion.

Linked Tests:
  - T-RS20251230-001: Lineage tracing with Cre-lox (designed)
  - T-RS20251230-002: Single-cell ATAC-seq (completed)

Parent: (none)
Children: H-RS20251231-001 (refinement)
```

#### `brenner hypothesis create`
```bash
brenner hypothesis create \
  --session=RS-20251230 \
  --statement="Cell fate is epigenetically determined" \
  --origin=proposed \
  [--parent=<id>] \
  [--proposed-by=<agent>] \
  [--tags=tag1,tag2]
```

#### `brenner hypothesis link <child-id> <parent-id>`
```bash
brenner hypothesis link H-RS20251231-001 H-RS20251230-001
# Links H-RS20251231-001 as a refinement of H-RS20251230-001
```

#### `brenner hypothesis search <query>`
```bash
brenner hypothesis search "epigenetic"

# Output:
Found 3 hypotheses matching "epigenetic":
  H-RS20251230-001: Cell fate is epigenetically determined... [active]
  H-RS20251231-001: Third alternative: chromatin accessibility... [active]
  H-RS20251230-002: Methylation is the only epigenetic... [killed]
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 5 commands implemented and documented
- [ ] `--help` works for each command
- [ ] JSON output format for scripting
- [ ] Error handling for invalid IDs, missing files
- [ ] Tab completion hints where possible

## Dependencies
- Task: Define Hypothesis Zod Schema
- Task: Implement Hypothesis Storage Layer

## Effort Estimate
~300 lines of code, ~3 hours","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BrownSnow","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:43:21.002318303-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-31T03:03:29.033854803-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-31T03:03:29.033854803-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented hypothesis CLI commands: list, show, create, search, link, stats subcommands","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-7oto","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-lm3b","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:45:00.550135621-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-7oto","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-4p5n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:45:00.641604875-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-7oto","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-8hv8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:45:00.672783022-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-7oto","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-jcuz","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-30T22:40:43.149691558-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-7yz","title":"Set up shadcn/ui with dark theme configuration","description":"# Task

Initialize shadcn/ui in the web app with dark theme as default.

# Steps

1. Run `bunx shadcn@latest init` in apps/web
2. Configure `components.json` for dark theme default
3. Install base components: button, card, badge, tabs, tooltip
4. Verify Tailwind CSS v4 compatibility

# Technical Notes

- shadcn/ui components go in `src/components/ui/`
- Use the 'New York' style (more refined)
- Configure CSS variables to use our custom OKLCH tokens

# Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] shadcn/ui initialized successfully
- [ ] Base components available
- [ ] Dark theme renders correctly
- [ ] No build errors

# Reference

 {"id":"brenner_bot-80h","title":"Feature: Testing Infrastructure Setup","description":"Set up core testing infrastructure for the project.

## Scope
- Vitest for unit/integration testing (Bun-compatible)
- Playwright for E2E browser testing
- Test configuration files
- Test scripts in package.json
- Test utilities and helpers

## Philosophy (from user requirements)
- NO mocks or fakes - test real behavior
- Real implementations, real data fixtures
- Detailed logging for debugging test failures

## Deliverables
- vitest.config.ts configured for Bun
- playwright.config.ts for E2E
- package.json test scripts
- Test helper utilities
- Logging infrastructure for test output","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:09:37.96653903-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T22:49:38.815114737-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T22:49:38.815114737-05:00","close_reason":"All child tasks completed: Vitest installed, Playwright configured, test utilities created","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-80h","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-o7a","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:10:03.756411674-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}

 {"id":"brenner_bot-84o","title":"Configure typography scale with fluid sizing","description":"# Task

Set up a typography scale using clamp() for fluid responsive sizing.

# Scale (Major Third - 1.25 ratio)

```css
--text-xs: clamp(0.6875rem, 0.65rem + 0.15vw, 0.75rem);
--text-sm: clamp(0.8125rem, 0.775rem + 0.2vw, 0.875rem);
--text-base: clamp(1rem, 0.95rem + 0.25vw, 1.125rem);
--text-lg: clamp(1.125rem, 1.05rem + 0.4vw, 1.375rem);
--text-xl: clamp(1.375rem, 1.25rem + 0.65vw, 1.75rem);
--text-2xl: clamp(1.625rem, 1.45rem + 0.9vw, 2.25rem);
--text-3xl: clamp(2rem, 1.75rem + 1.25vw, 3rem);
--text-4xl: clamp(2.5rem, 2.1rem + 2vw, 4rem);
```

# Line Heights (tighter for headlines)

- Body text: 1.6-1.65
- Large text: 1.3-1.5
- Headlines: 1.1-1.2

# Letter Spacing

- Small text: slightly loose (0.015em)
- Headlines: slightly tight (-0.02em to -0.035em)

# Fonts

- Sans: Instrument Sans (or Inter as fallback)
- Mono: JetBrains Mono (for code, terminal, operators)

# Implementation

1. Add font imports to layout.tsx (next/font)
2. Define tokens in globals.css
3. Create utility classes or Tailwind config

# Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Fonts load correctly
- [ ] Typography scales smoothly across viewport sizes
- [ ] Headlines tight, body text comfortable
- [ ] Code/mono text uses JetBrains Mono","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:13:08.992044195-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T19:35:45.282026352-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T19:35:45.282026352-05:00","close_reason":"Fluid typography scale added: 8 size tokens using clamp(), line heights, letter spacing, build verified","labels":["design-system","typography","ux","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-84o","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-7yz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:13:46.297570969-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-84o","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-1qx","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T19:21:59.419182619-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}
 {"id":"brenner_bot-8b10","title":"Task: Implement Program Storage Layer","description":"# Task: Implement Program Storage Layer

## Objective
Create file-based storage for research programs with session management.

## Implementation Details

### File Location
`apps/web/src/lib/program-storage.ts`

### Storage Structure
```
.research/
└── programs/
    ├── programs.json           # Index of all programs
    └── RP-20251230-cell-fate/  # Per-program directory
        ├── program.json        # Program metadata
        └── sessions.json       # Session order and metadata
```

### Index File Format
```json
{
  "programs": [
    {
      "id": "RP-20251230-cell-fate",
      "name": "Cell Fate Determination",
      "status": "active",
      "sessionCount": 4,
      "lastActivityAt": "2025-12-31T15:30:00Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

### Program File Format
```json
{
  "id": "RP-20251230-cell-fate",
  "name": "Cell Fate Determination",
  "description": "Investigating mechanisms of cell fate decisions...",
  "researchQuestion": "What determines whether a progenitor cell becomes...",
  "sessions": ["RS-20251230", "RS-20251231", "RS-20260101", "RS-20260102"],
  "status": "active",
  "createdAt": "2025-12-30T09:00:00Z",
  "updatedAt": "2025-12-31T15:30:00Z",
  "tags": ["epigenetics", "cell-biology", "development"]
}
```

### Core Functions
```typescript
// CRUD operations
export async function createProgram(
  input: Omit<ResearchProgram, 'id' | 'createdAt' | 'updatedAt'>
): Promise<ResearchProgram>

export async function loadProgram(programId: string): Promise<ResearchProgram | null>

export async function updateProgram(
  programId: string,
  updates: Partial<ResearchProgram>
): Promise<ResearchProgram>

export async function deleteProgram(programId: string): Promise<void>

// Session management
export async function addSessionToProgram(
  programId: string,
  sessionId: string
): Promise<void>

export async function removeSessionFromProgram(
  programId: string,
  sessionId: string
): Promise<void>

export async function reorderProgramSessions(
  programId: string,
  sessionIds: string[]
): Promise<void>

// Query operations
export async function listPrograms(
  filter?: { status?: ProgramStatus; tag?: string }
): Promise<ResearchProgram[]>

export async function getActivePrograms(): Promise<ResearchProgram[]>

export async function getProgramForSession(
  sessionId: string
): Promise<ResearchProgram | null>
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Programs stored in per-program directories
- [ ] Index enables fast listing
- [ ] Sessions can be added/removed from programs
- [ ] Session order is preserved
- [ ] Query by status and tags
- [ ] Lookup program by session ID

## Dependencies
- Task: Define Research Program Schema

## Effort Estimate
~180 lines of code, ~2 hours","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:51:00.537943629-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-31T03:06:17.822786817-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-31T03:06:17.822786817-05:00","close_reason":"Storage layer exists at apps/web/src/lib/storage/program-storage.ts","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-8b10","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-2qyl","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:51:33.164614498-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-8b10","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-4buj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:51:33.356683016-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-8b10","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-jcuz","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-30T22:42:19.541683209-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}
